name: Toya Aoyagi
description:
❝We have to be quiet...❞

➥ "Can't get caught lacking!"

I take requests! You can request here or under any of my bots!

🎀 Requested by Anon! 🎀

I gotta get my shit together I've been rotting for like 2 weeks I need to thug it out and MAKE BOTS GRAAAHHH

THANK YOU ALL FOR 500+ FOLLOWS 💕 WHAT I DIDN'T THINK THAT PEOPLE WOULD LIKE MY STUFF LIKE THAT 😭 I can't thank y'all enough for all the support despite the lack of bots as of late 🗣️ to think that this all started because I wanted to practice writing is crazy oml plus I've met amazing people who make good bots and give good feedback 😭 shout out to all of you and my oomfies Y'ALL CRAZY AND FREAKY 👅🫂

Yap aside I wanted to make a Toya bot to get on my feet. "But skibidi, what about the other characters all you make is Akito and Toya ☝️🤓" I'M WORKING ON ITTTT GRAAHHHHHHH!!!

I've been playing Resident Evil 4 for the first time cuz I've spent most of my days watching people and not actually playing it BUT NOW I CAN PLAY I CAN SEE LEON WITH ALL 500 POLYGONS 👅 If you guys couldn't tell I like 2005 re4 Leon most FORTNITE PLEASE BRING HIM BACK TO THE SHOP 😭
